docs.title: AI Drug Discovery Lab
docs.text:
Practical tutorials for AI-driven molecular design.

Real workflows. Real code. Real papers.

Every tutorial is reproducible.

Learn practical AI workflows for molecular generation, protein modeling, molecular docking, and molecular dynamics — with commands you can rerun today.

REINVENT4 GROMACS RDKit ProteinMPNN ESM2 Python

docs.title: What can this handbook help you with?
docs.text:
Topic You'll learn Molecular Generation RL and generative models for de novo design Protein AI Sequence/structure models and inverse folding Docking Virtual screening and pose prediction Molecular Dynamics Validation and free-energy workflows RDKit Fingerprints, descriptors, scaffolds Python Workflow Scripts and automation for the lab

New here? Start with Getting Started.

docs.title: Open Handbook
docs.text:
This site is the Open Handbook of AI Drug Discovery — not a blog. Each page is a chapter in a structured curriculum designed to stay useful for years.

:octicons-arrow-right-24: Browse the full handbook :octicons-mark-github-16: GitHub repository

docs.title: AI 药物发现实验室
docs.text:
AI 驱动分子设计的实践教程。

真实工作流 · 真实代码 · 真实论文

Every tutorial is reproducible.（所有教程均可复现）

本手册涵盖 分子生成、蛋白质建模、分子对接 与 分子动力学 的可复现实操流程。

REINVENT4 GROMACS RDKit ProteinMPNN ESM2 Python

docs.title: 我能帮你解决什么？
docs.text:
主题 内容 分子生成 强化学习与生成式 de novo 设计 蛋白质 AI 序列/结构模型与逆折叠 分子对接 虚拟筛选与构象预测 分子动力学 验证与自由能计算 RDKit 指纹、描述符、骨架分析 Python 工作流 脚本与自动化

新手请从 入门指南 开始。

docs.title: 最新教程
docs.text: 章节 状态 REINVENT4 教程 01 — 安装与首个分子 即将推出 REINVENT4 课程目录 20 章路线图 入门 — Conda 即将推出
